name: shg-investment-home-react-node
description: Homepage SHG Investment voi ReactJS + NodeJS

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev:watch" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:win: start "shg-backend" cmd /k "npm.cmd --prefix server run dev" && start "shg-frontend" cmd /k "npm.cmd --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.check: npm --prefix server run check && npm --prefix client run check
scripts.test: npm --prefix server run test && npm --prefix client run test
